name: tidy-find-magic-numbers
title: Constant Extraction Scan
description: Find repeated literals, configuration-like values, and policy constants that should be centralized into constants, config, or shared definitions. Use when a bounded module, folder, or repo needs explicit constant/common extraction analysis.
purpose: Identify exact literal values and policy constants that can be centralized without changing behavior.
when_to_use: Need to find extractable constants in a module, folder, or repo.
Need to reduce repeated literals and policy drift.
Need evidence-backed commonization candidates before refactoring.
do_not_use: Need to implement the refactor immediately without first identifying candidates.
The target contains no meaningful repeated literals or config-like values.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Where to scan for extractable constants.

structured_outputs.name: EXTRACTABLE_CONSTANTS
structured_outputs.description: Concrete literal values or policy constants that should be extracted.

structured_outputs.name: REUSE_OPPORTUNITIES
structured_outputs.description: Places where the same value or policy recurs.

structured_outputs.name: EXTRACTION_BLOCKERS
structured_outputs.description: Reasons some values should remain local.

neutrality_rules: Recommend extraction only when reuse or policy consistency is evidenced.
Do not force extraction for values that are local and semantically unique.
Separate extraction candidates from blockers and uncertainty.
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,deterministic-output | lens: hickey-carmack | output: md(contract=v1)]
procedure: Scan the target for repeated literals, thresholds, enum-like strings, and policy values.
Group candidates by semantic role rather than raw textual equality alone.
Recommend the narrowest centralization target for each candidate.
List blockers for candidates that should stay local.
mandatory_rules: Name the exact literal or value family being recommended.
Include evidence locations for each extraction recommendation.
lens_rationale: Constant extraction should prefer explicit reusable data over repeated magic literals.
